description: A community social feed for senior crafters to share handmade projects, swap patterns, and follow makers — chronological timeline with large readable type and senior-friendly affordances

pages.name: feed
pages.description: Main chronological timeline of craft posts from people you follow
components: Top bar with the community name 'Handmade Hearth', a large search input, a text-size toggle (A / A+ / A++), a help icon, and an avatar dropdown

Left sidebar with a 'Share a project' primary button at top, then a navigation list (Feed, My Projects, Patterns, Friends, Groups) with icons, and a 'Daily prompt' card showing today's craft suggestion

Center column timeline of post cards grouped by date header (Today, Yesterday, This week) — each card has poster avatar, name, craft specialty, project photo, caption, craft-type tag, and an actions row (Applaud, Comment, Save)

Right sidebar with a 'Crafters to follow' suggestion list (avatar, name, craft, Follow button), an upcoming community events list, and a quick links panel (Print this week's pattern, Local craft fairs)

animations.element: 'Share a project' primary button at the top of the left sidebar

pages.name: post
pages.description: Detailed view of a single craft post with materials, steps, and community comments
components: Same top bar as the feed
Post header with poster avatar, name, location, craft specialty, posted-date, and Follow / Message buttons on the right
Project gallery — large main photo on the left with a vertical thumbnail strip of additional photos, and a caption/story paragraph below describing how the project came together

Materials and steps panel — a checklist of materials with quantities on the left, and a numbered list of steps with step number, short title, and body paragraph on the right, plus a 'Print pattern' and 'Save to my scrapbook' button row
Comments section — sorted oldest-first, each comment shows commenter avatar, name, body text, posted-date, and a small applaud button, with a large comment composer at the bottom

animations.element: Large main project photo in the project gallery near the top of the page

pages.name: profile
pages.description: A crafter's profile page showing their portfolio and activity timeline
components: Same top bar
Profile header with a large avatar, full name, craft specialties as chips, hometown, years-crafting count, a short bio paragraph, and Follow / Message buttons
Stats row with four tiles: projects shared, applause received, patterns published, friends

Tabbed section (Projects, Patterns, Scrapbook, About) with the Projects tab active by default — showing a three-column grid of project tiles, each tile has a photo, title, craft-type tag, and posted-date
Activity timeline at the bottom listing recent actions in chronological order (commented on, applauded, saved, followed) with date stamps

animations.element: Large avatar in the profile header at the top of the page

pages.name: share
pages.description: Form for sharing a new craft project to the community feed
components: Same top bar
Page heading 'Share your project' with a one-sentence helper line about what makes a good post
Photo upload area at the top — a large drop zone with an 'Add photos' button, supports up to eight photos shown as thumbnails in a row

Main form with project title, craft-type dropdown, difficulty radio buttons (Beginner, Comfortable, Advanced), time-to-make input, story textarea, a materials list builder, and a numbered steps builder
Action bar at the bottom with a 'Save draft' secondary button, a 'Preview' secondary button, and a 'Post to feed' primary button

animations.element: Page heading 'Share your project' at the top of the content area

pages.name: patterns
pages.description: Browseable library of community-shared patterns and printable instructions
components: Same top bar
Page heading 'Patterns library' with a sub-heading showing the total pattern count and a sort dropdown (Newest, Most loved, Easiest, Quickest)
Filter bar with chips for craft type (Knitting, Crochet, Woodworking, Quilting, Embroidery, Paper craft), a difficulty selector, a time-required range, and a 'Free patterns only' toggle
Pattern grid (three per row) — each card has a photo of the finished piece, pattern title, contributor name and avatar, difficulty badge, estimated time, applaud count, and a 'Print' icon button
Pagination row at the bottom with large page-number buttons and a 'Show more' option

animations.element: Page heading 'Patterns library' with total-count sub-heading at the top of the page

pages.name: groups
pages.description: Directory of crafting circles and interest groups within the community
components: Same top bar
Hero block with the heading 'Find your crafting circle', a sub-headline about meeting fellow makers, a large search input for groups, and a 'Start a new group' primary button
Featured groups row — three large cards in a row, each with a banner image, group name, member count, craft focus, recent-activity line, and a 'Join group' button

Full groups list grouped by craft category — each category section has a category heading and a list of group rows with group avatar, name, member count, posts-this-week count, and a Join / Joined toggle button
Footer panel with a 'How groups work' explainer (three numbered points) and links to community guidelines and group-leader resources

animations.element: 'Start a new group' primary button inside the hero block at the top of the page
